title: acosmium dasycarpum subsp. glabratum
intro: Acosmium dasycarpum subsp. glabratum is a plant species, also known as the palo de lacre or sticklac tree, belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Acosmium dasycarpum subsp. glabratum include relief from pain, fever reduction, and the treatment of various digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and respiratory issues.
